privacy: browser-local; no network; no storage; no forms; no wallet; no token availability

missions.title: Proof-settled market brief
missions.objective: Produce a decision-ready market brief for an evidence-governed AI service with assumptions, downside cases, measurable success criteria, validator duties, and unresolved questions.
missions.expectedArtifact: Executive brief + claims matrix + risk ledger

missions.title: Validator-ready software task
missions.objective: Convert a software improvement request into a bounded job spec with acceptance tests, tool limits, replay requirements, and a settlement-ready proof packet.
missions.expectedArtifact: Job spec + validation checklist + replay path

missions.title: Dispute-resolution rehearsal
missions.objective: Simulate a contested AGIJobManager work package, surface evaluator disagreement, preserve dissent, and prepare a human review path without moving funds.
missions.expectedArtifact: Dissent register + dispute note + selection record

missions.title: Sovereign Machine Economy walkthrough
missions.objective: Show how Meta-Agentic cognition, Alpha Node runtime, AGI Jobs work OS, and AGIJobManager settlement connect into one proof-producing loop.
missions.expectedArtifact: Lineage map + operating loop + claim boundary

missions.title: Data-Zero legal boundary check
missions.objective: Verify that the public user experience asks for no personal data, uses no forms, runs local demos only, and keeps wallet operations behind the Expert Console.
